accepted_scope: content-addressed byte storage with pre-write workspace containment
journal hash-chain transition and fork verification
restart cursor with no assumed in-flight success
candidate-only proposed-delta identity and path containment
evidence completeness calculation and compact result rendering
limitations: Repository text identities use canonical Git LF bytes so Windows CRLF checkout filters cannot invalidate equivalent content.
The certificate schema requires a modality label; workflow denotes the package carrier only and grants no workflow semantic or runtime authority.
The audio_mask and workflow fixtures prove only content-agnostic byte and delta sealing, not audio, mask, media, graph, node, model, or quality evaluation.
No GPU, generation, repair, semantic review, independent-juror, golden-mask, Git, credential, destructive-action, threshold-change, product, activation, release, or promotion authority is granted.
The campaign executor remains blocked until every role required by a particular immutable contract is independently qualified.
next_action: Use the qualified deterministic and evidence-compiler roles only within their exact CPU scopes; continue independent controller and reviewer role qualification before any multimodal campaign admission.
